actual_current_surface_status: exact negative boundary / Legendre normalization freedom
proposal_allowed_reason: kappa_H remains a field-normalization freedom without a residue/kinetic condition.
required_next_theorem: identify a physical scalar pole or canonical kinetic term
fix kappa_H from the residue/kinetic normalization
then compute y_t = c_source * kappa_H with v as substrate input
strict_non_claims: does not identify the source scalar with H_unit
does not use observed y_t or m_t
does not promote the Ward theorem
verdict: The Legendre transform is covariant under source/operator rescaling. Changing kappa preserves Gamma = J phi - W while changing the two-point curvature and the Yukawa readout.  Therefore the source-to-canonical-Higgs normalization kappa_H is not selected by the Legendre transform alone; a pole-residue or canonical kinetic normalization theorem is required.
